Localization.value: Add {finding} on {evidenceCase} on {visualNode}. Previous finding was {previousFinding}
Augmented change potential for {node} from {oldPotential} to {newPotential}
ICI Table potential value edit
Impose policy {newPolicy} on {visualDecisionNode}. Last policy was {lastPolicy}
Restrict link {link}
Movements: {movements}
Edit agent {agentName} with action {stateAction}
Replace agent for {node} from {currentAgent} to {newAgent}
Replace decision criteria for {node} from {currentDecisionCriteria} to {newDecisionCriteria}
Edit partitioned interval of node {node} with action {stateAction}
Set property {otherPropertyAction} of node {node} to data: {newProperty}
Replace partitioned interval of node {node} from {currentPartitionedInterval} to {newPartitionedInterval}
Paste {clipboardContent}
Paste finalizer
Remove {finding} on {evidenceCase} on {visualNode}.
Remove link restrictions of: {links}
Remove nodes: {nodesToRemove}\nRemove links: {linksToRemove};
Edit revelation interval from link {link} with action {stateAction}
Change potential for {node} from {oldPotential} to {newPotential}
N value must be positive, but it was {nValue}.
Theta value must be in range 0..1, but it was {thetaValue}.
Undirected links cannot be inverted, meaning it is not possible to invert {link}
You are trying to change the domain of a TreeADD, but that is not allowed.
Network from {fileToRead} is corrupted and could not be loaded.

Family rule nº2 has been broken.
If one of the distributions is a Beta, then:
· all the others must be Exact with v = 0 or Complement
· at least one of the others must be Complement.

Family rule nº3 has been broken.
If one of the distributions is a Dirichlet, then:
· all the others must be Exact with v = 0 or Dirichlet.
· at least one of the others must also be a Dirichlet.
Family rule nº4 has been broken.\nThe specification of sensitivity analysis in ProbModelXML has been violated. Please, check the distributions and its parameters.
Introduced limit ({introducedLimit}) is equal to the limit of an interval ({interval}) and both belong to the same side.
Link inversion is only possible for Chance nodes that have a potential, which is not the case for {wrongNode}
It was expecting {expected}, but {foundAsString} was found instead.
There is no network opened.
There is no row selected, and at least one it is required.
There should be a node selected in the network.
The system has run out of memory
This operation requires more memory than available in your system.
There is already a property named {propertyName}.
Node {node} has a Pre-Resolution Finding that cannot be modified in Inference Mode.
You have selected all states to remove, you must leave at least one in each branch.
Could not find resource {resource}.
There is no next Evidence Case.
There is no node in data.
There is no previous Evidence Case.
Intervals cannot be split out of their bounds
Tried to split interval outside its bounds.
Unexpected menu action found: {actionCommand}
Value {numericValue} is out of {domain}
Value {numericValue} is outside the domain of the variable, which is [{domain.getMin}..{domain.getMax}].
Expected class {expectedClass}, found: {foundClass}
Infinity cannot belong to the interval
Limits values are wrong.
Expected role {expectedRole}, found: {foundRole}
Requested zoomManager ({requestedZoom}) is out of the range [{minZoom}..{maxZoom}].
Visual {link}
Selected nodes: {nodes}\nSelected links: {links}
